Errors.permissionDenied: You do not have permission to perform this action.

page.title: Dashboard
page.subtitle: Overview of your inventory, orders, and operations.

stockByLocation.title: Stock by location
stockByLocation.description: Per-location totals show “facility › location” when a warehouse is set; store-only rows use the location name alone. The table groups stock by facility vs neutral retail site.
stockByLocation.bySiteHint: Warehouse rows are named facilities; the retail row uses your tenant name when locations are not linked to a facility.

movementTrends.title: Movement trends
movementTrends.description: Daily stock movements over the last 30 days

expiringLots.title: Lots expiring soon
expiringLots.description: Lots expiring in the next 30 days
expiringLots.noExpiring: No lots expire in the next 30 days

error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

products.title: Products
products.newDescription: Add a new product to your catalog
products.notFoundBody: The product you are looking for does not exist.

validation.skuMax: SKU must be 100 characters or less
validation.nameMax: Name must be 255 characters or less
validation.unitCostMin: Unit cost must be zero or greater
validation.reorderPointInt: Reorder point must be a whole number
validation.reorderPointMin: Reorder point must be zero or greater

categories.title: Categories
categories.emptyHint: Create a category to get started.
categories.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

form.createDescription: Fill in the details to create a new category.
form.name: Name
form.slugHint: URL-friendly identifier. Leave blank to auto-generate from the name.

validation.nameMax: Name must be 255 characters or less
validation.slugMax: Slug must be 255 characters or less

warehouses.title: Warehouses
warehouses.description: Facilities: distribution centers, buildings, and sites. Create a warehouse here, then add bins, aisles, and zones on Stock locations.
warehouses.searchPlaceholder: Search facilities by name or address…
warehouses.emptyDescription: Create a warehouse to represent a building or DC, then link stock locations to it.
warehouses.deleteDescription: Delete "{name}"? Stock locations linked to this facility may need to be reassigned first.

form.createDescription: Add a distribution center, building, or site.
form.name: Name

validation.nameMax: Name must be 255 characters or less

locations.title: Stock locations
locations.description: Bins, aisles, and zones—not buildings or DCs. Link a location to a warehouse (facility) when stock lives under that site; leave unlinked for store-only inventory.

warehouseStrip.lowStockLines: {count, plural, one {# low-stock line} other {# low-stock lines}}

locations.emptyDescription: Add your first bin, zone, or aisle. Link it to a facility when the stock sits in a warehouse; leave “no facility” for store-only layouts.
locations.emptyDescriptionNoFacilities: You can add store-only locations now. To organize stock under a building or DC, create a warehouse first—then link each new location to that facility.
locations.noFacilitiesCalloutBody: Create a warehouse for each building or distribution center before you group locations under it. You can still add retail-only locations that are not tied to a facility.
locations.stockSheetDescription: Browse all product lines at this location.

hierarchy.hintCommandPalette: Tip: open the command palette (search) to jump straight to a location detail page.

detail.invalidBody: The location id in the URL is not valid.
detail.notFoundBody: This location does not exist or you cannot access it.
detail.capacityHint: Utilization versus max capacity for this location.

form.createDescription: Add a bin, zone, or aisle. Optionally link it to a facility, or leave unlinked for retail-only storage.
form.editDescription: Update the details for this stock location.
form.facilityHint: Leave unset for retail-only storage. When set, this location is grouped under that facility. Add or change facilities on the Warehouses screen.
form.name: Name
form.capacityHint: Maximum stock units this location can hold. Leave empty for unlimited capacity.

stockRecords.title: Stock Records
stockRecords.description: Current stock levels across all locations

lots.title: Stock Lots
lots.description: View and filter lot/batch records with expiry tracking.

movements.listDescription: View all stock movements across your inventory.
movements.createDescription: Create a new stock movement (receive, issue, transfer, or adjustment).

detail.invalidBody: The movement id in the URL is not valid.
detail.notFoundBody: This stock movement does not exist or you do not have access to it.
detail.title: Movement #{id}

form.cardMovementHint: Select the type, product, quantity, and relevant locations.
form.cardLotHint: Optionally assign this received stock to a lot.
form.cardAllocationHint: Choose how lots are allocated when issuing or transferring stock.

validation.receiveToRequired: Destination location is required for receive movements
validation.issueFromRequired: Source location is required for issue movements
validation.transferFromRequired: Source location is required for transfers
validation.transferToRequired: Destination location is required for transfers
validation.adjustmentLocationRequired: At least one location is required for adjustments

list.title: Reservations
list.description: Manage stock reservations for sales orders and manual holds.

create.title: Create Reservation
create.description: Reserve stock for a sales order or manual hold.

list.title: Cycle Counts
list.description: Schedule and manage physical inventory count cycles.

create.title: Start Cycle Count
create.description: Create a new physical inventory count cycle.

form.name: Name *
form.notesPlaceholder: Any additional notes about this cycle count...

notFound.title: Cycle Not Found
notFound.body: The cycle count you are looking for does not exist.

countLine.pendingRemaining: {count, plural, one {# item remaining} other {# items remaining}}
countLine.countedSummary: {count, plural, one {# item counted} other {# items counted}}
countLine.emptyLines: No count lines found for this cycle.

validation.quantityInt: Quantity must be a whole number

variance.resolveNeedCount: {count, plural, one {# line with variances needs resolution} other {# lines with variances need resolution}}
variance.matchingNoVariance: {count, plural, one {# line with no variance (auto-accepted)} other {# lines with no variance (auto-accepted)}}
variance.completeToReview: Complete all counts and mark the cycle as completed to review variances.

page.title: Bulk Operations
page.description: Perform stock transfers, adjustments, and revaluations in bulk.

transfer.cardDescription: Move stock from one location to another in bulk.
transfer.productsDescription: Add products and quantities to transfer.
transfer.toastNoItems: Add at least one product to transfer

adjustment.cardDescription: Set new stock quantities for products at a specific location.
adjustment.productsDescription: Specify the new quantity for each product.
adjustment.toastNoItems: Add at least one product to adjust

revalue.cardDescription: Set new unit costs for each product. This updates the product record directly without creating stock movements.
revalue.toastNoItems: Add at least one product with a valid unit cost

result.errorsDescription: The following items could not be processed

create.description: Add a supplier to your directory

validation.leadTimeMin: Must be greater than or equal to 0

form.lineItemsDescription: Products to order from this supplier

detailView.lineItemsCount: {count, plural, one {# line item} other {# line items}} on this order

validation.atLeastOneLine: At least one line is required

create.description: Record goods received against a purchase order

page.description: Manage your organisation profile and branding

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Update your tenant name and branding

validation.hexColor: Must be a valid hex color (e.g. #3B82F6)

page.title: Team Members
page.description: Manage team members and their roles

removeDialog.title: Remove team member
removeDialog.descriptionLead: Are you sure you want to remove
removeDialog.descriptionTrail: from the team? They will lose access to this tenant immediately.

invite.title: Invite a team member
invite.description: Send an invitation by email. They will receive a link to join your organization.

cancelDialog.title: Cancel invitation
cancelDialog.descriptionLead: Are you sure you want to cancel the invitation to
cancelDialog.descriptionTrail: ? The invitation link will no longer work.

acceptInvitation.invalidDescription: This invitation link is invalid, expired, or has already been used.
acceptInvitation.invitedPrefix: You've been invited to join as
acceptInvitation.existingAccountHint: An account with this email already exists. Enter your password to confirm your identity and join the organization.

page.title: Billing & Subscriptions
page.description: Manage tenant plans, usage, and billing (superuser only)

suspendDialog.title: Suspend tenant
suspendDialog.descriptionLead: Are you sure you want to suspend
suspendDialog.descriptionTrail: ? The tenant will not be able to log in or access data until reactivated.

reactivateDialog.title: Reactivate tenant
reactivateDialog.descriptionLead: Are you sure you want to reactivate
reactivateDialog.descriptionTrail: ? The tenant will be able to log in and access data again.

changePlan.title: Change plan — {name}
changePlan.description: Update subscription plan, status, or billing notes.

page.title: Platform Users
page.description: Manage all users across tenants (superuser only)

suspendDialog.title: Suspend user
suspendDialog.descriptionLead: Are you sure you want to suspend
suspendDialog.descriptionTrail: ? They will lose access to all tenants. This can be reversed by editing the user.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.description: Enter a new password for this user. Minimum 8 characters.

createDialog.title: Create user
createDialog.description: Create a new user and optionally assign them to tenants.

page.title: Invitations
page.description: All tenant invitations across the platform. Superuser only.

create.title: New Customer
create.description: Add a new customer to your directory

list.title: Sales Orders
list.description: Manage sales orders and track fulfillment

create.title: New Sales Order
create.description: Create a new sales order with line items

detail.title: Sales Order Details
detail.description: View order information, line items, and manage order status
detail.cancelPrompt: Cancel sales order "{orderNumber}"? This cannot be undone.

form.toastAtLeastOneLine: Add at least one line item
form.toastFixLines: Fix line item errors before submitting
form.orderDetailsDescription: Basic information for the sales order.

list.title: Dispatches
list.description: Manage and process dispatches for sales orders
list.processPrompt: Process dispatch "{dispatchNumber}"? This will create stock movements and cannot be undone.

create.title: New Dispatch
create.description: Create a dispatch to ship goods against a sales order

form.detailsDescription: Pick a confirmed sales order. After you create the dispatch, use 'Process' on the list to issue stock (the order must stay confirmed until then).
form.emptySalesOrdersHint: No confirmed sales orders. Confirm a draft order first, then create a dispatch.

fulfillmentDialog.title: Stock at dispatch source
fulfillmentDialog.description: Per line: ordered quantity vs unreserved stock at the dispatch source. You can issue only what is available now, open the sales order to reduce line quantities or cancel the dispatch, or receive/transfer stock into this location first.

marketing.title: Powerful inventory management
marketing.subtitle: Everything you need to run your inventory efficiently
marketing.catalogDescription: Organize products with SKUs, descriptions, images, and hierarchical categories

marketing.alertsDescription: Set reorder points and get notified when stock runs low

register.description: Register a new organization and set up your account as the owner.
